columns.name: PAKKEDATO
columns.description: Date when the packing was done

columns.name: FORVENTET_FRIGITT
columns.description: Expected amount to be released

columns.name: FRIGITTDATO
columns.description: Date when the release was done

columns.name: PLANLAGT
columns.description: Indicator for scheduled status (1: yes, 0: no)

columns.name: PAKKE_TIME
columns.description: Time when the packing was done (HHMM)

columns.name: PAKKE_MINUTT
columns.description: Minutes part of the time when the packing was done

columns.name: PAKKE_SEKUND
columns.description: Seconds part of the time when the packing was done

columns.name: PAKKE_PRIORITET
columns.description: Priority level for packaging

columns.name: PAASLAG_VEKT
columns.description: Weight of the packed item(s)

columns.name: PAASLAG_KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Comments related to the weight

columns.name: LAGER_STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the warehouse (e.g., active, inactive)

columns.name: SKIFT
columns.description: Identifier for the shift in operation

columns.name: SP_DATO_VARMEBEH
columns.description: Date related to thermal storage (if applicable)

columns.name: DOSERING_BEIS
columns.description: Dosage or amount per batch

columns.name: KONT_BEISEFORBRUK
columns.description: Quantity consumed from the batch

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Identifier for the user who performed the operation

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of the event or operation

columns.name: MAAL_BEISE_FORBR
columns.description: Indicates if batch consumption has occurred (1: yes, 0: no)

columns.name: RAAV_PARTINR
columns.description: Order reference for raw materials

columns.name: PAKKE_ORDRE_TIME
columns.description: Time when the packing order was issued (HHMM)

columns.name: PAKKE_ORDRE_MIN
columns.description: Minutes part of the time when the packing order was issued

columns.name: PORTABULK_AVSL
columns.description: Status indicator for port bulk operations (1: active, 0: inactive)
